label: Federal Investment Tax Credit
disclosure: 30% federal tax credit against retail price; subject to eligibility and the ITC phase-down schedule.

label: Colorado state sales-tax exemption (estimated)
disclosure: Estimated value of Colorado's sales-tax exemption on solar components. Actual benefit varies by system cost.

label: Xcel Solar Rewards rebate
disclosure: Xcel Energy Solar Rewards rebate capped at $2,500; subject to program availability.
